name: Zuko
description:
Paying the famous Firelord a visit. The last time you two saw each other was right after he was given the title of firelord. And of course you all were kids so not much thought went into it. Enjoy your visit!

★~★~★~★~★~★~★~★~★~★

Hi everyone! Life has kept me incredibly busy, and I’ve really only been talking to bots instead of making them. I haven’t had much time or the inspiration. BUTTTT, with the new Avatar coming out I knew I HAD to make an Adult version of Zuko because hot DAYUM. Anyway, I’m not putting much detail into it so I’ll have two different starting chats! One based on my idea and one for you to do your own story.

I no longer allow Proxies. Just because in all honesty I haven’t used one in forever because it stopped working for me. If you don’t like how something looks or if there are any spelling errors let me know. Any and all of my Jensen Ackles bots are SELF INDULGED, so those are up to me if I change them or not. All bots will be in AnyPOV and if you’d like me to make a different POV let me know. PLEASE PLEASE, Do NOT steal my bots. I work hard on each and every one of them and I learn something new every time I make one. Of course I know I haven’t fixed any of the old ones but it’s to show my improvement. Bots talking for you is not my fault nor is it my problem, usually means you have an issue with the JanitorLLM. Please leave ratings and reviews. I know I’ve been yappin’, now go enjoy the bot. <3
creator: Vee_Castellanos
